steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content: The cost is \$430 for the first day and \$215 for each additional day. For $ x $ days, there is 1 day at \$430 and $ x - 1 $ days at \$215. This creates a linear equation with a fixed initial cost and a variable rate for extra days.

steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Distribute and combine like terms: $$ y = 430 + 215(x - 1) \$$
\$$ y = 430 + 215x - 215 \$$
\$$ y = 215x + 215 \$$

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content: The simplified equation $ y = 215x + 215 $ matches the form in choice A. A is correct.
